cubes.title: Fixing a Leaking Faucet
rules: MUST turn off the water supply before starting any repair work.
MUST use an adjustable wrench to loosen the faucet components.
SHALL inspect the washer and O-ring for wear and tear; replace if damaged.
PROHIBITED using excessive force when tightening faucet parts to avoid cracking.
WARNING: Ensure the workspace is dry to prevent slipping or electrical hazards.
MUST use plumber's tape on threaded connections to ensure a watertight seal.
SHALL test the faucet after repair to confirm the leak is fixed.
WARNING: Wear safety gloves to protect hands from sharp edges or hot water.
cubes.rationale: Prevents water waste and potential water damage to the home.

cubes.title: Replacing Brake Pads on a Car
rules: MUST use a jack and jack stands to lift the car securely before starting.
MUST wear safety gloves and goggles to protect against brake dust and sharp edges.
PROHIBITED from working on brakes without ensuring the car is in park and the parking brake is engaged.
MUST use a brake pad spreader or C-clamp to compress the brake caliper piston.
WARNING: Avoid inhaling brake dust as it may contain harmful materials; use a mask if necessary.
MUST inspect the brake rotor for wear or damage before installing new pads.
PROHIBITED from reusing old brake pads or hardware if they are worn or damaged.
MUST torque the caliper bolts to the manufacturer's specifications using a torque wrench.
WARNING: Test the brakes at low speed in a safe area after replacement to ensure proper function.
cubes.rationale: Ensures safe and effective replacement of brake pads, preventing accidents and maintaining vehicle performance.

cubes.title: How to Paint a Room Like a Professional
rules: MUST clean the walls thoroughly before painting to remove dust and grease
MUST use painter's tape to protect trim, windows, and outlets
SHALL apply primer if painting over a dark color or new drywall
PROHIBITED painting without proper ventilation; ensure windows are open or use a fan
WARNING: Wear safety goggles and a mask to avoid inhaling fumes or getting paint in your eyes
MUST use a high-quality roller and brush for even coverage
SHALL allow each coat of paint to dry completely before applying the next
WARNING: Keep paint and tools away from children and pets
MUST cover the floor with drop cloths to protect it from spills
cubes.rationale: Ensures a smooth, professional finish while maintaining safety and efficiency

cubes.title: Starting to Save Money from Zero
rules: MUST create a detailed budget to track income and expenses. Use tools like spreadsheets or budgeting apps (e.g., Mint, YNAB).
MUST set a specific savings goal, such as an emergency fund or a down payment.
SHALL automate savings by setting up automatic transfers to a savings account.
PROHIBITED spending on non-essential items until the savings goal is met.
WARNING: Avoid high-interest debt, such as credit card debt, as it can hinder savings progress.
MUST review and adjust the budget monthly to ensure savings goals are on track.
SHALL seek out free financial education resources to improve money management skills.
PROHIBITED using savings for discretionary purchases unless it aligns with the savings goal.
WARNING: Be cautious of scams promising quick financial gains; focus on steady, disciplined saving.
cubes.rationale: Helps individuals build financial security and achieve long-term goals by establishing disciplined saving habits.

cubes.title: Learn a Foreign Language in 3 Months
rules: MUST dedicate at least 1 hour daily to focused language practice
MUST use language learning apps like Duolingo or Babbel for structured lessons
PROHIBITED relying solely on passive learning methods like watching TV without subtitles
MUST practice speaking with native speakers using tools like iTalki or HelloTalk
WARNING: Avoid overloading yourself with too many resources; focus on consistency
MUST set specific, measurable goals (e.g., learn 500 words in a month)
PROHIBITED skipping review sessions; use spaced repetition tools like Anki
WARNING: Ensure proper ergonomics when studying to avoid physical strain
cubes.rationale: Provides actionable steps to achieve fluency in a short timeframe

cubes.title: Overcoming Procrastination
rules: MUST identify the root cause of procrastination, such as fear of failure or lack of motivation.
MUST break tasks into smaller, manageable steps to reduce overwhelm.
SHALL use productivity tools like Pomodoro timers or task management apps to stay focused.
PROHIBITED multitasking; focus on one task at a time to maintain efficiency.
MUST set specific, achievable deadlines for each task to create accountability.
WARNING: Avoid perfectionism, as it can lead to unnecessary delays and stress.
SHALL reward yourself after completing tasks to reinforce positive behavior.
MUST eliminate distractions by creating a dedicated workspace free from interruptions.
cubes.rationale: Helps individuals improve productivity and reduce stress by addressing procrastination effectively.

cubes.title: How to Clean a Laptop Screen Safely
rules: MUST turn off the laptop and unplug it before cleaning to avoid electrical hazards.
MUST use a microfiber cloth specifically designed for electronics to prevent scratches.
MUST apply a small amount of distilled water or screen cleaning solution to the cloth, not directly to the screen.
PROHIBITED using household cleaners, ammonia, or alcohol-based products as they can damage the screen coating.
PROHIBITED spraying liquids directly onto the screen to prevent liquid seepage into the device.
WARNING: Avoid applying excessive pressure while cleaning to prevent screen damage.
MUST gently wipe the screen in a circular motion to remove smudges and dust effectively.
MUST allow the screen to air dry completely before turning the laptop back on.
cubes.rationale: Properly cleaning a laptop screen ensures longevity and maintains display clarity without causing damage.

cubes.title: Investing Your First $100
rules: MUST research investment options such as stocks, ETFs, or mutual funds before committing funds.
MUST use a reputable brokerage platform like Robinhood, Fidelity, or Vanguard for transactions.
PROHIBITED investing in high-risk assets like cryptocurrencies without understanding the volatility.
MUST allocate funds based on your risk tolerance and financial goals.
WARNING: Avoid scams by verifying the legitimacy of investment platforms and advisors.
MUST diversify your investment to reduce risk, even with a small amount.
PROHIBITED investing money you cannot afford to lose.
WARNING: Be cautious of 'get rich quick' schemes promising unrealistic returns.
MUST monitor your investments regularly to track performance.
MUST educate yourself on basic investment principles using resources like Investopedia or books.
cubes.rationale: Helps beginners start investing wisely with limited funds.
